transcript.text:
[A portion of the advertisement earnings will be donated to child welfare facilities to help children in need]
I've never had anything like this
[Have you heard of Daechang & Jjukkumi?] (Beef Large Intestine & Webfoot Octopus)
[Tzuyang is here for Jjukkumi Dosa]
I love it
[Jjukkumi, mayo, fish roe, radish]
[A wrap you can't go wrong with]
[Amazing]
That was the "bite of the year"
[How about this?]
What? lol
[Local's spiciest webfoot octopus]
[Open sesame]
[Dangerous Jjukkumi]
[Is this possible?]
[Will she be okay?]

Hello everyone
I'm here to eat some jjukkumi
This restaurant first started here in Cheonho-dong
And now there are 45 of them around the country
I'm thankful that they invited me over because I've been wanting to try it
Hello, cutie
[Jjukkumi Dosa]
This is no joke... My mouth is watering already
Smells amazing
There's a lot
They're known for this Daechang Jjukkumi I have to try this first
Cheese steamed egg
Jjukkumi should be good with meat pancake too
They have the spiciest jjukkumi out in the market right now
I'm scared, but I'll try a little bit at the end
What kind of beverages do you have?

We have coke, sprite, and zero coke
But there's a section just for you
[Plum juice just for you]
[And the fuel cup]
-I'm a subscriber -Really?
I put the juice and the cup for you
[It's all for you]
[Their main dish: Jjukkumi Daechang] (Beef Large Intestine & Webfoot Octopus)
Thank you
[Crazy visuals]
We'll come back to check up on you after this hourglass is finished
This is cool
That looks good
Eating daechang and jjukkumi together is a first for me It's going to be great
Thank you
Thank you

[Fuel time at Jjukkumi Dosa]
Lovely
I asked them not to put dropworts
[Glass noodles]
-Try a perilla leaf wrap with radish, sauce, and fish roe -Thank you
He said the small ones are good to eat
Let's give it a taste
PD: You're the center of attention
[Center of attention]
The sauce is good
But the jjukkumi itself is very meaty
It's 2 tentacles per piece, but they're huge
Delicious
I love its texture Even the sauce
I ordered the less spicy one, but it's still spicy
And it's flavorful

Some mayonnaise
Flying fish roe
Pickled radish
Very tasty
Thank you
The meat pancake goes well with spinach
The glossiness
This is spinach? That's cool
Maybe it's not cooked
It melted in my mouth It's not dry at all
Egg and the meat is so soft So good
It's going to be great with jjukkumi
Come here!
FIsh roe
This is going to be so good
The sauce is incredible

It has bold & deep flavors
Is daechang ready to eat?
It's steamed egg!
Why were you standing there?
Because careful when you eat this
[Cheese explosion]
Let's take a picture
Wow, amazing
[Watch your jaw...]
So good
It's like corn cheese
This would go well with jjukkumi
I'm going to at sweet corn for steamed egg from now on It's so good
Let's try the daechang now
I actually did try daechang with jjukkumi before
But their daechang pieces were very small and greasy

But this one is very savory
This is so good
Daechang meat is the highlight here
So good together
With some glass noodles
Don't just order the jjukkumi, You must order it with daechang!
Can I add more daechang, please?
When you eat them together,
The combination of daechang flavors and jjukkumi's spiciness blend in so well with its textures
This combination is this year's best
Daechang,
Jjukkumi,
Flying fish roe,
This can't go wrong
That was the "bite of the year"
Some glass noodles

Dining in for jjukkumi is amazing
[More daechang]
[You can order all the add-ons you want]
Now it's just like new
[The more you cook, the better it gets]
Daechang on top
Jjukkumi on top
Daechang and Jjukkumi
I love gopchang (beef small intestines)
But I'd still order daechang for this
Flying fish roe
My daechang
[Making a skewer]
I can't settle with just 3 servings
Look at that big poster over there JjuDaeSae (Jjukkumi+ Beef Small Intestine+Shrimp)
That dish has a lot of vegetables so it gives it a very sweet flavor overall

How about just a little big of vegetables?
[Finishing up the daechang jjukkumi]
[Scrape it all off the grill]
[Jju Gop Sae]
Here's round 2
Thank you
It's with less amount of vegetables
[There's jjukkumi for those who wait...]
What is that?
This comes with glass noodles, but you already had glass noodles so I brought rice cakes
Thank you
Some rice cake for a spicy rice cake restaurant owner
You can eat in a little bit
This is like a hot pot
This calls for some alcohol
This is very different from the previous dish

It's really big
Completely different
More sweetness and less spiciness
I like this more than the nakji (baby octopus) one
I love the texture of jjukkumi
Some jjukkumi on top
And shrimp
I ate it
I meant to do this
I'm wondering if this is all a dream
[She's eating so much]
The 2 neighborhoods here are known for jjukkumi
Both regions have great jjukkumi
The other place (Yongdu-dong) solely focused on jjukkumi itself with no side dishes
But over here (Cheonho-dong), they give you lots of side items that can be eaten along with jjukumi
I really like that feature

I can continue eating it
I wanted to try the Dangerous Jjukkumi
But I'm scared What should I do?
It's almost time
I'm thinking of ordering the Dangerous Jukkumi
I heard it's the spiciest jjukkumi in the market
I've never had anything spicier than that yet
[He tries stopping her...]
Well.. then...
Just 1 serving of it
What? lol
What is this
[What in the world...?]
I'm scared
[The elderly and pregnant women should be careful of the spiciness]
This... wait a minute...

I can smell it a little
[Open sesame]
[This looks like the devil]
[Getting her stomach ready]
Let me know if it's too spicy because I can bring other add-on items to bring down the spiciness
Go ahead and try it now
[Challenge!]
Wait a sec...
It smells dangerous
You know when you smell something and it stings you Makes you want to sneeze
I need to fill up my stomach
I'm scared
Let me try 1 more
I'm fine
My nose tickles
It's really spicy

But it's a good type of spicy It relieves stress
[Relieving all of this year's stress?]
Water makes it all go away
It's spicy!
[I need help]
It's good, but
Can I add some pork belly?
-We're already on it -Thank you
[Wait a little bit, I'm on my way]
[There's a person dying here...]
Thank you
A lot, please
Mix
Pork belly
It should be okay now, right?
Maybe I shouldn't have mixed it

With pork belly,
It's just about right
Spicy, but manageable
Can I get fried rice with no spiciness?
[Of course]
With some meat pancake
How about like this?
[Good good]
It tastes good with pork belly
I'll eat it with fried rice
This is spicy, but
it tastes good and it relieves stress
You should try this if you're into spicy food
[Let's stir-fry it]
Looks good
[Fried rice complete]

Amazing
The crispy rice on the bottom is so crunchy
This grill is everything
It's not stuck on the grill because of the oil
The crispy rice is very delicious
It's very spicy, but I can eat it
With some rice
Flying fish roe
It's good by itself, but having other side items make it better
The crispy rice is very tasty
[It's all gone...]
[Finished]
[Well that was quick...]
I just kept eating I was too focused
What is this?
This is a gift for you as a fan

You can take this home, cook it in your pan and eat it right away
Thank you!
Thanks everyone
[Part of the advertising revenue will be donated to 'Sol Namu Children's Welfare Center'] [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
